form.formComment: Having second run back today. Fresh up after three months finished second of 7 runners at Kempton Park on March 14 over 4100m, a neck behind Teddy Blue carrying 75kg at $7.50. Previously second-up came from midfield and won by 1.0 len Wincanton in a G2 Rising Stars Novices' Chase on November 8 over 4000m defeating Breaking Cover carrying 71.5kg at $2 in a jumps. Improvement likely with conditions in his favour

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Racing well. Comes off a 30 day let-up. Last run finished fourth in a small field at Cheltenham in the G1 Arkle Challenge Trophy on March 10 over 3200m, 22 len behind Kargese carrying 73kg at $34. Race before won by 6 len Kempton Park in a G2 Pendil Novices' Chase on February 21 over 4100m defeating Jasmine Bliss carrying 71kg at $1.70 in a jumps. Has been racing well. Could feature.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. First-up after three months raced on the pace prior to fading finished sixth of 14 runners at Cheltenham in the G1 Broadway Novices' Chase on March 11 over 5000m, 10 len behind Kitzbuhel with 73kg at $8.50. Previously second-up finished second in a small field at Punchestown in the G2 Florida Pearl Novice Chase on November 22 over 4828m, 3 len behind Oscars Brother carrying 71kg at $4.50. Rates highly.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. Resuming favourite; ran on from midfield and won by 6 len Newbury in a G2 Game Spirit Chase on February 7 over 3300m on heavy going defeating Saint Segal carrying 71kg at $1.40 in a jumps. Second-up finished third in a small field at Cheltenham in the G1 Arkle Challenge Trophy on March 10 over 3200m, 5 len behind Kargese carrying 73kg at $2.10. Top chance.

Second-up finished third in a small field at Cheltenham in the G1 Arkle Challenge Trophy on March 10 over 3200m, 5 len behind Kargese carrying 73kg at $2.10. Top chance.

form.formComment: Recent form impressive for this race. Freshened for 61 days. Last run ran last in a small field at Warwick in the G2 Kingmaker Novices' Chase on February 7 over 3250m, on rain affected going; 27 len behind Steel Ally carrying 72kg at $2.40. Start to post a big 7 len win. Kempton Park in a G2 Wayward Lad Novices' Chase on December 27 over 3200m defeating Hansard with 69kg at $3.10 in a jumps. Interesting up in trip.
